pages.raw_text:
E. A. Cooney will be candidate
for the position of state organizer
for the American Federation of La
Dor. The organizer is recommend
ed by the state convention to Pres
ident Sam Gompers Of the A. F. OF
l.. and such recommendation is &C
cepted. In this way the appoint
ment is practically made by the
state organization.


1t is not unlikely that the entire
delegation from this city will stand
squarely behind Mr.. Cooney for
the position. Spokane has received
little recognition at the hands OF
the state federation in the past and
it is the general opinion that it
should receive one of the state Of
fees besides a vice president,


Mr. Cooney has been successful
as an organizer. Since assuming
the office of local organizer for the
A. F. of L. he has succeeded In
organizing several local unions.
Some of these unions were consid-
cred an impossible task from an
organizing standpoint and had been
passed up by G. O. Young, the
state organizer, and others.


Among the local unions he or
ganized are the laundry workers,
street railway employees and crack
err bakers. He has also been sue
cessful in Strengthening out various
disputes among local unions over
questions of jurisdiction.
